They offer a range of services including local, international, intermodal, interstate, and office relocation, as well as packing, unpacking, and storage solutions. The company operates under the Atlas Van Lines brand, ensuring high-quality service with regular inspections and customer feedback to improve moving efficiency. Palmer Moving Services also provides pre-move counseling, policy consulting, and reporting services to help clients manage their moving needs effectively.

Name: Pro Piano Movers
Description: Pro Piano Movers is a moving service based in Santa Ana, CA, specializing in specialized moves for homes, studios, businesses, and residential clients. They offer a range of services including local, long-distance, office, student, and commercial moving support, as well as specialized moving for pianos, furniture, and special items like art and household belongings. The company emphasizes careful handling, communication, and safety throughout the relocation process, ensuring that each move is handled with care and professionalism. Pro Piano Mo Moving also provides additional services such as protective equipment, safe transport, and flexible scheduling options to accommodate various moving needs.

Name: Premiere Van Lines
Description: Premiere Van Lines is a moving company that offers residential and commercial moving services across various locations in Canada. Their main functionality includes providing packing, unpacking, and storage solutions for homes and offices, as well as international moves. Key features include a network of branches for local assistance, an online moving calculator to estimate costs, and a commitment to customer satisfaction with a focus on safe handling of belongings.

Name: Quality Services Moving
Description: Quality Services Moving is a moving company that offers residential, corporate, and international relocation services. Their main functionality includes local, long-distance, interstate, packing, storage, and specialized services for senior relocations and vehicle transportation. They provide personalized moving assistance tailored to individual customer needs and utilize advanced logistics and technology to ensure smooth transitions. The company also features over 100,000 square feet of secure storage solutions and operates in-house to manage all aspects of the move process.

Name: Queen City Transitions
Description: Queen City Transitions offers senior moving services and estate dispersal for seniors and their families. Their main functionality includes organizing, sorting, and downsize items, coordinating movers, arranging shipments, and providing professional packing and relocation assistance. They also offer related services such as cleaning, waste removal, and senior escort support to help seniors navigate the process of selling or liquidating their homes. The company focuses on personalized service and aims to create a stress-free transition for clients throughout the move.

Name: Reindeer Logistics
Description: Reindeer Auto Relocation offers vehicle relocation services for individuals and businesses in the U.S., Canada, and worldwide. Their main functionality includes providing personalized moving assistance, managing costs, and ensuring a safe and stress-free move through a 24/7 team of specialists. Key features include an online quote request process, real-time tracking of the move, and a commitment to customer service with a focus on building trust and understanding.

Name: Roadway Moving
Description: Roadway Moving is a moving company that offers residential and commercial moving services across various locations in New York City, Los Angeles, Miami, and Philadelphia. Their main functionalities include local moving, interstate moving, apartment moving, pool table moving, and art moving. They also provide secure storage solutions for belongings, including short-term and long-term storage, as well as GPS tracking to ensure efficient move management. The company emphasizes customer satisfaction and community involvement through its referral program and donation initiatives.

Name: Roadway Moving
Description: Roadway Moving is a moving company that offers a variety of services including local, long-distance, interstate, and international moves for both residential and commercial clients. Their main functionality includes providing white-glove moving, art moving, and secure storage solutions. Key features include GPS tracking for efficient packing and unpacking, a referral program, and a commitment to customer service through their Platinum Referral Program. Roadway Moving operates across multiple locations in New York City, Los Angeles, Miami, and other regions.

Name: Rose Moving & Storage
Description: Rose Moving & Storage is a moving company based in Canton, MI, offering a range of services for both residential and corporate moves. Their main functionalities include household moving, commercial moving, international relocation, office installations, and warehouse storage solutions. They provide personalized moving plans tailored to individual needs, handle all aspects of the move, including packing, loading, and unpacking, ensuring quality service from start to finish. The company emphasizes customer satisfaction and offers flexible pricing options throughout the moving process.

Name: Royal Hawaiian Movers
Description: Royal Hawaiian Movers is a moving company that specializes in residential and international moves across the islands of Hawaii, including Oahu, Maui, Kauai, and the Big Island. They offer a range of services such as DIY moving, storage solutions, trucking, warehousing, and special shipping services. The company employs trained movers who provide personalized support throughout the move process, ensuring a smooth experience for customers, from packing to post-move assistance. Royal Hawaiian Moovers also emphasizes community service and offers resources like moving checklists and FAQs to assist clients.

Name: Sea & Air International
Description: Sea & Air International is an international moving company that offers a range of relocation services for individuals and businesses worldwide. Their main functionality includes providing customized moving plans, customs clearance management, storage solutions, and white glove packing to ensure safe handling of belongings. They handle various moves such as household, corporate, fine arts, and diplomatic relocations, catering to both individual clients and organizations looking to relocate internationally. The company emphasizes personalized service and efficient logistics to facilitate smooth transitions from New York City to their new destinations.

Name: Siracusa Moving & Storage
Description: Siracusa Moving & Storage is a moving company based in Connecticut that offers a range of services including local, long-distance, international, and commercial moving. They provide packing, unpacking, and storage solutions for items like furniture, vehicles, and medical equipment. With over 45 years of experience, Siracusa specializes in specialized moves such as senior relocations, corporate relocation, and university transfers, ensuring personalized service and support throughout the move process. The company also operates an online store with over 1 million square feet of warehouse space for efficient storage needs.

Name: South Hills Movers
Description: South Hills Movers is a moving company based in Pittsburgh, PA, offering residential and corporate relocation services. They specialize in local moves across the Pittsburgh area, as well as international relocations with trucks equipped with GPS for real-time tracking. The company provides free estimates and emphasizes customer service throughout the move process, ensuring a seamless experience for clients.

Name: Square Cow Movers
Description: Square Cow Movers is a moving company that offers a range of services for both residential and long-distance moves across Texas, Florida, and other states. Their main functionality includes providing packing materials, heavy lifting assistance, and labor only services for clients who prefer to work independently. Key features include personalized moving consultations, transparent pricing with no hidden fees, and a commitment to customer satisfaction through their No Problem, No Pleasure policy. They also offer free estimates and have a network of locations in Texas, Tennessee, Georgia, and North Carolina.

Name: Starving Students
Description: Starving Students Movers is a moving company that offers a range of services including local, long-distance, corporate relocation, commercial, and international moves. They provide packing, storage, estate cleanouts, and specialized moves for seniors and trade shows across various regions in California, Washington DC, Texas, Louisiana, and New Orleans. The company emphasizes professional service, competitive pricing, and customer satisfaction, with a strong rating system based on customer reviews to ensure quality support. Starving Students has over 45 years of experience and operates its own moving trucks to deliver efficient and cost-effective moving solutions.

Name: Storage Scholars
Description: Storage Scholars offers moving and storage services specifically for college students. Users can sign up in five minutes to receive tailored solutions for their move-out needs, including door-to-door pick-up and delivery, secure climate-protected storage options, and shipping ship boxes. The service aims to simplify the relocation process by providing free packing supplies, personalized communication, and a network of trusted movers to ensure quality support throughout the process.

Name: The Dudes Moving Co.
Description: The Dudes Moving Co. is a family-owned moving company based in Kansas City, MO, offering a range of services including local and long-distance moves, furniture packing, junk removal, and office relocations. Their main functionality is to provide professional moving assistance tailored to individual needs, with features such as same-day notice for last-minute moves, transparent quotes without hidden fees, and no insurance costs. The company emphasizes customer satisfaction and aims to deliver high-quality moving solutions while ensuring transparency and trust throughout the move process.

Name: The Moving Company
Description: The Moving Company offers moving services for both residential and commercial clients in Texas. Their main functionalities include packing, loading, unloading, and unpacking of belongings, ensuring safe and secure relocation. They utilize a fleet of medium-duty trucks equipped with features like diesel engines and specialized boxes, providing reliable transportation to various cities across Texas and beyond. The company also offers packing supplies such as bubble wrap and box protectors to support the smooth transition for families during their move.

Name: TSI (Transit Systems, Inc.)
Description: TSI Shipping offers personalized moving and shipping services for both residential and commercial moves. They provide a range of options including small moves, estate distribution, senior relocation, and emergency services. TSI has a nationwide network of movers, shippers, and organizers that can accommodate various budgets and needs, ensuring efficient and timely delivery of belongings. Their services also include specialized shipping for items like furniture, medical devices, and art, along with resources to help customers understand the logistics of their moving process.

Name: U-Haul
Description: U-Haul is a moving and storage service that offers a wide range of products including trucks, trailers, self-storage solutions, and packing supplies. Customers can make online reservations for moving within the U-Hhaul network, access moving assistance through a marketplace, and purchase moving boxes or accessories. The company also provides services such as propane refills, emergency storage options, and specialized vehicles like the Toy Hauler, which allows for quick delivery across the US and Canada. Additionally, U-haul features an app for easy management of moving needs and quotes.

Name: Undergrads LLC
Description: Undergrads Moving is a moving service that connects customers with vetted university-student movers for various types of moves. The company offers services such as heavy lifting, apartment relocations, and truck rentals, all handled by students in their own homes or colleges. Key features include a guarantee of on-time arrival, transparent pricing without hidden fees, and damage coverage on every move. Customers can easily book moving through an online form, receive instant estimates, and benefit from a streamlined process that includes scheduling, budgeting, and insurance options.

Name: United Van Lines
Description: United Van Lines is a moving company that offers a range of services for both local and international moves. Their main functionalities include packing, unpacking, storage, car shipping, and custom moving solutions tailored to individual needs. Key features include a one-stop move portal for online management, customizable moving plans, and specialized services for corporate relocations, ensuring a smooth relocation experience for clients across the United States.

Name: UNITS Moving and Portable Storage
Description: Units is a moving and storage service that specializes in providing portable storage containers and self-storage solutions for long-distance moves. Their main functionality includes offering secure, safe, and efficient storage options for both residential and commercial clients, with a focus on customer satisfaction and exceptional service. Key features include a delivery system called ROBO-UNIT, which allows for easy container placement and quick turnaround times for rentals or storage needs. Unites also provides packing materials and professional packers to assist customers throughout the moving process.

Name: University Moving and Storage Co., Inc.
Description: University Moving & Storage is a moving company based in Farmington Hills, MI, offering a range of services for residential, commercial, and international moves. Their main functionalities include local, interstate, and intrastate moving, as well as specialized storage solutions and logistics services. They provide free quotes, virtual surveys, and financing options to assist customers with their moving needs. The company has over 50 years of experience and operates multiple locations across Michigan and Ohio.

Name: Home Sweet Home
Description: Home Sweet Home is a global organization that provides relocation support for individuals and families. Their main services include onsite management, house cleaning, and a Discard and Donate Program to help reduce waste in local communities. The company focuses on delivering personalized service while ensuring a positive impact on the environment through partnerships with over 1,000 professional organizers. They aim to create a stress-free moving experience by managing all aspects of the move from packing to settling into daily operations.

Name: United Van Lines Ltd.
Description: United Van Lines Ltd. is a moving company that offers a range of services for long-distance and international moves across Canada, including local moving, cross-border relocation, packing, unpacking, and car transport. They provide customized moving solutions tailored to individual needs and budgets, ensuring customer satisfaction throughout the move process. Key features include dedicated Move Manager support, professional packing and unpacking services, and a commitment to environmental sustainability through their eco-friendly practices.

Name: Von Paris Moving & Storage
Description: Von Paris Moving is a full-service moving company based in Baltimore that offers residential, commercial, and international relocation services. They provide comprehensive support for long-distance moves, including packing, unpacking, and storage solutions, as well as document management services to help clients manage their belongings efficiently. The company operates state-of-the-art storage facilities with humidity-controlled chambers, ensuring secure and efficient handling of client goods. Their team consists of experienced professionals who ensure smooth transitions and personalized service throughout the move process.

Name: Ward North American
Description: Ward North American is a moving company that offers a range of services for both residential and commercial moves in Texas. Their main functionalities include local, long-distance, corporate relocation, household storage, art and piano moving, and third-party moving. They provide free quotes, conduct background checks for drivers, and offer specialized services such as furniture installation and hospital move management. The company emphasizes professional training for their movers and aims to ensure safe and efficient moving experiences.

Name: Surv
Description: Surv's Local Home Services offers a range of home maintenance and moving assistance for homeowners. Their main functionality includes providing services such as local moving, furniture assembly, junk removal, yard work, gardening, and more. Customers can book jobs online in just three simple steps, after which trained team members will arrive to complete their to-do list tasks efficiently. The company emphasizes community service by ensuring that all staff are insured and trained to meet individual customer needs.

Name: Wheaton World Wide Moving
Description: Wheaton World Wide Moving is a moving company that offers a range of services for residential, corporate, and commercial moves. Their main functionalities include providing estimates, organizing move-in/out-of-state moves, packing, and storage solutions. They operate a network of over 300 local agents across the U.S., offering tailored moving packages for various needs such as senior relocations, employer relocation, and international moves. Wheaton emphasizes customer service and quality assurance throughout the moving process, ensuring timely communication and support for clients.
